memoryArtifacts.headline: tree_Moores_Ancestry
memoryArtifacts.description: This document was compiled by Orville Sullivan L6L2-JJB who is a grandson of Carrie Moore and Delos Sullivan, I was given a paper copy and decided to scan it in and create the searchable text form of the document so others may see and use it. I  tagged a number of the people found in the document to make it easier for others to locate.

memoryArtifacts.headline: tree_Sullivan_Family_Sheet
memoryArtifacts.description:
This family sheet was found in papers of Mildred Evelyn Sullivan LNKH-8PV a granddaugher of Delos.

It was created by her brother Orville Oscar  Sullivan L6L2-JJB who had done a great deal of searching for ancestors. 

Many of the children of Delos appear to have had children.  None were entered at this time (7 July 2020) as I do not know their status

Nte that for Fay William the birth is Sept 21 not 2

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Agnes Borland於1837年5月26日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭時，她的父親John Borland III45歲，母親Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody25歲。她於1864年與Cornelious S Moore在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她在美國愛阿華州法也特住了大約15年且在美國愛阿華州法也特普利桑特 瓦利 堂史普住了大約10年。她去世於1925年3月11日在美國愛阿華州波爾克德斯 莫內斯享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Agnes Borland于1837年5月26日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭时，她的父亲John Borland III45岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody25岁。她于1864年与Cornelious S Moore在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她在美国艾奥瓦州法也特住了大约15年且在美国艾奥瓦州法也特普利桑特 瓦利 堂史普住了大约10年。她去世于1925年3月11日在美国艾奥瓦州波爾克德斯 莫內斯享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Borland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Bor(e)land or Bordland in Dumfriesshire, Galloway, Fife, and Perthshire, which are named with Old or Middle English bord ‘board, table’ + land ‘land’, i.e. land that supplied the lord's table, in other words ‘home farm’.

variants.name: Burland
meanings: English: topographic name from either Middle English burlond ‘peasant land’ (Old English gebūrland) or Middle English burgh + lond ‘land belonging to a town or borough’ (Old English burg + land). The surname could also be a habitational name from any of the places in Cheshire and the East Yorkshire named Burland, or Bowerland in Devon, Surrey, and Kent. The Yorkshire name is derived from Old English bȳre ‘byre, cow shed’ + land, the rest from Old English (ge)būr ‘peasant’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1843: Keokuk, Iowa Territory, United States 1843: Iowa Territory, United States 1846: Polk, Iowa Territory, United States 1846: Polk, Iowa, United States [Spreads into Polk and Warren counties]
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Gettysburg
historicEvents.description: The three day Battle of Gettysburg was one of the bloodiest of the American Civil War. Between the Confederates and Unions, somewhere between 46,000 and 51,000 people died that day.

historicEvents.title: The Chinese Exclusion Act
historicEvents.description: A federal law prohibiting all immigration of Chinese laborers. The Act was the first law to prevent all members of a national group from immigrating to the United States.

historicEvents.title: The Newhall House Hotel Fire
historicEvents.description: A fire erupted on January 10, 1883, at the Newhall Hotel in Milwaukee. The fire began at 4:00 am in an elevator shaft and raced up through the building. The fire spread so quickly that many could not escape. General and Mrs. Tom Thumb, stars of P.T. Barnum's circus, were guests in the hotel at the time of the fire. A firefighter reached them by ladder and they were able to escape safely. The exact number of deaths remains unknown as the hotel register was destroyed in the fire, however, the death toll is estimated between 75-90.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Wisconsin Historical Society - Newhall House Hotel Fire

historicEvents.description: St. Louis, Missouri, United States hosts Summer Olympic Games.

historicEvents.title: The Movie Theater
historicEvents.description: The world’s first movie theater was located in Pittsburgh. It was referred to as a nickelodeon as at the time it only cost 5 cents to get in.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Agnes Borland was born on 26 May 1837, in Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States, her father, John Borland III, was 45 and her mother, Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody, was 25. She married Cornelious S Moore in 1864, in Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Fayette, Iowa, United States for about 15 years and Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, United States for about 10 years. She died on 11 March 1925, in Des Moines, Polk, Iowa, United States, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Agnes Borland est née le 26 mai 1837, à Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, son père, John Borland III, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Cornelious S Moore en 1864, à Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis pendant environ 15 ans et à Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis pendant environ 10 ans. Elle est décédée le 11 mars 1925, à Des Moines, Polk, Iowa, États-Unis, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Agnes Borland am 26. Mai 1837 in Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Borland III 45 und ihre Mutter Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody 25. Sie hat 1864 in Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Cornelious S Moore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie hat ungefähr 15 Jahre lang in Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten und ungefähr 10 Jahre lang in Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 11. März 1925 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Des Moines, Polk, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Agnes Borland è nata il il 26 maggio 1837 nel Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, John Borland III, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Cornelious S Moore nel 1864, nel Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 15 anni e nel Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 10 anni. Morì il 11 marzo 1925, nel Des Moines, Polk, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Agnes Borlandが1837年5月26日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドで生まれた時，父John Borland IIIは45歳，母Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoodyは25歳であった。1864年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドでCornelious S Mooreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女はアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットに約15年間，アメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットプレアサント ヴァリー トウンシュイップに約10年間住んでいた。彼女は1925年3月11日にアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ポルクズ モインスで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Agnes Borland(이)가 1837년 5월 26일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Borland III(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1864년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드에서 Cornelious S Moore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 아이오와 주 파예트에서 약 15년, 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 플리산트 발리 타운시프에서 약 10년 동안 살았다. 그녀는 1925년 3월 11일 미국 아이오와 주 폴크 데스 모이네스에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Agnes Borland nasceu em 26 de maio de 1837, em Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Borland III, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Cornelious S Moore em 1864, em Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América por quase 15 anos e em Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América por quase 10 anos. Ela faleceu em 11 de março de 1925, em Des Moines, Polk, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Agnes Borland родилась 26 мая 1837 г. в местности вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени John Borland III было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cornelious S Moore в 1864 г. в местности вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты около 15 лет и в местности плисант валли тоуншип, феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты около 10 лет. Она умерла 11 марта 1925 г. в местности десь моаинесь, полк, Айова, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Agnes Borland nació el 26 de mayo de 1837, en Westmoreland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Borland III, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Cornelious S Moore en 1864, en Westmoreland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos durante unos 15 años y en Pleasant Valley Township, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos durante unos 10 años. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1925, en Des Moines, Polk, Iowa, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 87 años.
